section2/accounts/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
section2/accounts/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

section2/accounts/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the java.version property.
section2/accounts/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may not strictly enforce bytecode compatibility with the target JDK version specified in properties.

section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.general_idea: Replace wildcard Lombok import with explicit imports for Getter, Setter, and ToString.
Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.before: super(String.format("%s not found withe the given input data %s: '%s'", resourceName, fieldName, fieldValue));
section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.after: super("%s not found withe the given input data %s: '%s'".formatted(resourceName, fieldName, fieldValue));
